caveat: CLI header reports error_max_turns / terminal_reason max_turns, but raw output contains usable role-specific findings. Count as one Claude perspective only.
key_findings: Candidate is high-value but not ready beyond passive UI/docs mapping.
Codex deterministic route and Hermes synthesis are required before any proof; this was later run and synthesized.
Allowed-state-change language must be tightened; object creation must be an explicit operator gate, not an allowed action.
Account B, second tenant, role matrix, named owned object labels, redaction plan, and positive/negative control protocol are missing.

Preserve hypotheses such as inbox object boundary, membership leakage, deleted/archived item reappearance, shareable link boundary, signed URL replay, metadata leak, drafts/scheduled messages, and workflow routing upgrade.
required_next_actions: Run Codex deterministic review for <program-name> candidate.
Hermes synthesis and lane_state worker_route_status update.
Keep candidate passive-only until operator-approved bounded proof plan exists.
